title: トウカイテイオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the beginning of Tokai Teio's
training.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Helloooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear an excited voice, and turn to see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio shouts and leaps over the high fence
surrounding the track.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Enter the graceful Teio! Morning, Trainer!
choice_data_list: It's dangerous to jump over the fence like that.
It's dangerous to jump over the fence like that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm fine! That was a breeze for the
invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was an unbelievable jump. Once more, I'm
struck by the incredible physical prowess she
possesses.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, today we start training for real, yeah? I'll do
anything, so lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If I'm gonna take down Prez, I gotta give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So let's get down to business! I'll follow your lead,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And that makes five laps around the track!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, what's next? Hit me with whatever you got!
choice_data_list: That was the last thing on my checklist...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! That's it?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nghh! Why are you going easy on me? Don't you
know I'm the invincible Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I know, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, that's not the point! I'm never gonna beat
Prez if I don't go the extra mile!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just come with me for a second! You'll
understand!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whew, look at that gaggle of onlookers! She
always draws a crowd!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, look over there, Trainer! On the track!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Thank you for training with me, President Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're facing your first graded race, so I'm sure
you are anxious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope this session leaves you with something that
can help you improve. Now, please, give it your
all.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez is about to start her partner running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf begins to run slowly in order to
guide her inexperienced partner. Until...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if she could hear Tokai Teio, Symboli Rudolf
shoots off, leaving her partner far behind.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! She's still speeding up?! That's two
lengths, three lengths, and... she's crossed the
finish line!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Every time I see Prez in action, I can't help
but sing her praises!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I felt the same thing when I saw Tokai Teio run.
That complete and total control over the race.
It's...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So you get it now, right? The way Prez runs.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She's got the instincts and the smarts to read a
race, and the legs to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't just keep training like normal! I need super
training!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So let's get back to it! I gotta keep running!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now that was a great workout!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I bet it's taught you a thing or two about how
much training I really need, too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, great!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's the thing about Prez. Nobody can catch up
to her by just doing the normal stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The outcome of a race is never certain—unless
Symboli Rudolf is running in it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you said something like that about any other
Umamusume, it'd sound ridiculous...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But when I see Prez run, I know it's true.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's not just me who thinks that. Everyone feels
it—that's why it's such a popular quote.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's what makes Prez amazing. Anyone who
sees her is completely captivated by her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And that's the kind of Umamusume I'm gonna be!
I'll surpass even Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll become so great that no matter how big a goal
I aim for, everyone'll believe I can do it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Mhm! You better set your sights sky-high, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna surpass Prez for sure! And to
do that, I'll run my heart out again tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Tokai Teio's challenge starts now!
